title: Protocol-Scaffolded Agentic Workflows Artifacts
description: Public artifact repository supporting an empirical paper on protocol-scaffolded agentic workflows, cross-provider LLM evaluation, retained evidence chains, reviewer-mediated assessment, and bounded local resilience. The release series concept DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.20552809; version v1.0.7 is archived at 10.5281/zenodo.20553373.
